name: ibn-al-azhar-docs
description: Arabic-first, RTL-first document processing workspace for Ibn Al-Azhar Docs.

scripts.secrets:scan: git diff --cached | grep -nE 'sk-[0-9a-fA-F]{20,}|sk-ant-[A-Za-z0-9_-]+|ANTHROPIC_API_KEY[[:space:]]*=|ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN[[:space:]]*=|TESTSPRITE_API_KEY[[:space:]]*=' || echo 'No obvious staged secrets'
